mnemonics: CPU CREW: CPU Utilization, Throughput, Turnaround time, Response time, Equity, Waiting time
keyPoints: CPU Utilization: Keeping the CPU as busy as possible.
Throughput: Number of processes completed per time unit.
Turnaround time: Interval from submission to completion of a process.
Waiting time: Amount of time a process has been waiting in the ready queue.
Response time: Time from submission until the first response is produced.
commonMistakes: Confusing turnaround time with response time (turnaround is completion, response is first output).
Assuming higher throughput always means better performance (it might come at the cost of response time).
Forgetting that fairness (equity) is a crucial criterion alongside performance metrics.
